practiceChallenge.title: Fill in the prefix-sum range rule
practiceChallenge.description: Complete the helper so it returns the right idea for building and using a prefix array.
hints: Build a running total from left to right.
Range sum uses prefix[right] minus the total before left.
If left is 0, there is nothing earlier to subtract.
practiceChallenge.successMessage: Nice work. You rebuilt the main prefix-sum range rule.
practiceChallenge.retryMessage: Not yet. Recheck how the helper array is built and how subtraction answers a range.
